_doc: LPDDR4 spec (Phase 1.2 analytic). 64-bit bus. JEDEC 3200 MT/s -> 25.6 GB/s peak; board-config 4224 MT/s -> 33.8. Peaks tagged ASSUMPTION (in-repo has no data-rate source). eff 0.71 is the MEASURED efficiency from the production-card LPDDR4x decode anchor (voyager-sdk.md:278), applied here to LPDDR4 (a different but related memory) -> eff_BW is DERIVED. NO discrete-transfer floor (that lives in the CIM topology spec).

notes.eff: 0.71 measured on production-card LPDDR4x decode (voyager-sdk.md:278); applied to LPDDR4 -> eff_BW derived.
notes.floor: no per-call discrete-transfer floor here; PCIe/DMA floor is in cim_topo_alpha.
